   277â†’rbgm_payor_refresh() {
   278â†’  zrbgm_sentinel
   279â†’
   280â†’  buc_doc_brief "Display the manual Payor OAuth credential installation/refresh procedure"
   281â†’  buc_doc_shown || return 0
   282â†’
   283â†’  zrbgm_s1     "Manual Payor OAuth Credential Installation/Refresh Procedure"
   284â†’  zrbgm_d      "Use this for initial credential setup after payor establishment or to refresh expired/compromised credentials."
   285â†’  zrbgm_d      "Testing mode refresh tokens expire after 6 months of non-use."
   286â†’  zrbgm_e
   287â†’  zrbgm_s2     "When to use this procedure:"
   288â†’  zrbgm_d      "  - Initial setup after running rbgm_payor_establish"
   289â†’  zrbgm_d      "  - Payor operations return 401/403 errors"
   290â†’  zrbgm_d      "  - OAuth client secret compromised"
   291â†’  zrbgm_d      "  - 6+ months since last Payor operation"
   292â†’  zrbgm_e
   293â†’  zrbgm_s2     "1. Obtain OAuth Credentials:"
   294â†’  zrbgm_d      "   For initial setup:"
   295â†’  zrbgm_d      "      - Use JSON file downloaded during rbgm_payor_establish"
   296â†’  zrbgm_d      "   For refresh/renewal:"
   297â†’  zrbgm_dld    "      - Go to: " "Credentials for Payor Project" "https://console.cloud.google.com/apis/credentials?project=${RBRP_PAYOR_PROJECT_ID}"
   298â†’  zrbgm_dm     "      - Find existing " "${RBGC_PAYOR_APP_NAME}" " OAuth client"
   299â†’  zrbgm_d      "      - Click the OAuth client name to open details"
   300â†’  zrbgm_d      "      - To rotate secret if compromised:"
   301â†’  zrbgm_dm     "        a. Click " "+ Add secret"
   302â†’  zrbgm_d      "        b. Click the download icon next to the NEW secret"
   303â†’  zrbgm_dm     "           Browser downloads: " "client_secret_[id].apps.googleusercontent.com.json"
   304â†’  zrbgm_dmd    "        c. Click " "Disable" " on the secret with the older creation date"
   305â†’  zrbgm_d      "        d. Click the trash icon to delete that disabled secret"
   306â†’  zrbgm_e
   307â†’  zrbgm_s2     "2. Install/Refresh OAuth Credentials:"
   308â†’  zrbgm_d      "   Run the payor install command with the downloaded JSON:"
   309â†’  zrbgm_dc     "      " "rbgp_payor_install ~/Downloads/client_secret_*.json"
   310â†’  zrbgm_d      "   This will:"
   311â†’  zrbgm_d      "   - Guide you through OAuth authorization flow"
   312â†’  zrbgm_d      "   - Store secure credentials in RBRR_SECRETS_DIR/rbro-payor.env"
   313â†’  zrbgm_d      "   - Update RBRP_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID in rbrp.env"
   314â†’  zrbgm_d      "   - Test the authentication"
   315â†’  zrbgm_d      "   - Initialize depot tracking"
   316â†’  zrbgm_d      "   - Reset the 6-month expiration timer"
   317â†’  zrbgm_e
   318â†’  zrbgm_s2     "3. Verify Installation:"
   319â†’  zrbgm_d      "   Test with a simple operation:"
   320â†’  zrbgm_dc     "      " "rbgp_depot_list"
   321â†’  zrbgm_d      "   Should display current depots without authentication errors."
   322â†’  zrbgm_e
   323â†’  zrbgm_d      "Prevention: Run any Payor operation monthly to prevent expiration."
   324â†’
   325â†’  buc_success "OAuth credential installation/refresh procedure displayed"
   326â†’}

   385â†’rbgm_LEGACY_setup_admin() { # ITCH_DELETE_THIS_AFTER_ABOVE_TESTED

   389â†’  buc_doc_shown || return 0
   390â†’
   391â†’  zrbgm_s1     "# Google Cloud Platform Setup"
   392â†’  zrbgm_s2     "## Overview"
   393â†’  zrbgm_d      "Bootstrap GCP infrastructure by creating an admin service account with Project Owner privileges."
   394â†’  zrbgm_d      "The admin account will manage operational service accounts and infrastructure configuration."
   395â†’  zrbgm_s2     "## Prerequisites"

   399â†’  zrbgm_d      "---"
   400â†’  zrbgm_s1     "Manual Admin Setup Procedure"
   401â†’  zrbgm_d      "Recipe Bottle setup requires a manual bootstrap procedure to enable admin control"
   402â†’  zrbgm_e
   403â†’  zrbgm_dc     "Open a web browser to " "${RBGC_SIGNUP_URL}"
   404â†’
   405â†’  zrbgm_critic "This procedure is for PERSONAL Google accounts only."
   406â†’  zrbgm_d      "If your account is managed by an ORGANIZATION (e.g., Google Workspace),"
   407â†’  zrbgm_d      "you must follow your IT/admin process to create projects, attach billing,"

   409â†’  zrbgm_e
   410â†’  zrbgm_s2     "1. Establish Account:"
   411â†’  zrbgm_dc     "   Open a browser to: " "${RBGC_SIGNUP_URL}"
   412â†’  zrbgm_dm     "   1. Click -> " "Get started for free"

   414â†’  zrbgm_d      "   3. Provide:"
   415â†’  zrbgm_d      "      - Country"
   416â†’  zrbgm_dm     "      - Organization type: " "Individual"

   422â†’  local z_configure_pid_step="2. Configure Project ID and Region"

   424â†’  zrbgm_d      "   Before creating the project, choose a unique Project ID."
   425â†’  zrbgm_dc     "   1. Edit your RBRR configuration file: " "${ZRBGM_RBRR_FILE}"
   426â†’  zrbgm_d      "   2. Set RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID to a unique value:"

   435â†’  zrbgm_d      "   Sign in with the same Google account you just set up"
   436â†’  zrbgm_d      "   1. Open the Google Cloud Console main menu:"
   437â†’  zrbgm_dmd    "      - Click the " "->" " hamburger menu in the top-left corner"
   438â†’  zrbgm_dm     "      - Scroll down to " "IAM & Admin"
   439â†’  zrbgm_dm     "      - Click -> " "Manage resources"
   440â†’  zrbgm_d      "        (Alternatively, type 'manage resources' in the top search bar and press Enter)"
   441â†’  zrbgm_dm     "   2. On the Manage resources page, click -> " "CREATE PROJECT"
   442â†’  zrbgm_d      "   3. Configure:"

   444â†’  zrbgm_dm     "      - Organization: " "No organization"
   445â†’  zrbgm_dm     "   4. Click " "CREATE"
   446â†’  zrbgm_dmdr   "   5. If " "The project ID is already taken" " : " "FAIL THIS STEP and redo with different project-ID: ${z_configure_pid_step}"
   447â†’  zrbgm_dmd    "   6. If popup, wait for notification -> " "Creating project..." " to complete"
   448â†’  zrbgm_e

118â†’zrbf_stitch_build_json() {
   119â†’  zrbf_sentinel
   120â†’
   121â†’  buc_log_args 'Stitching trigger-compatible build JSON from step scripts'
   122â†’
   123â†’  # Preconditions: vessel loaded and git state captured
   124â†’  test -s "${ZRBF_VESSEL_SIGIL_FILE}" || buc_die "Vessel not loaded â€” call zrbf_load_vessel first"
   125â†’  test -s "${ZRBF_GIT_INFO_FILE}"     || buc_die "Git info not captured â€” ensure git metadata is captured before stitch"
   126â†’
   127â†’  buc_log_args 'Read vessel state for substitutions'
   128â†’  local -r z_sigil=$(<"${ZRBF_VESSEL_SIGIL_FILE}")
   129â†’  test -n "${z_sigil}" || buc_die "Empty vessel sigil"
   130â†’  local -r z_dockerfile_name="${RBRV_CONJURE_DOCKERFILE##*/}"
   131â†’  local -r z_platforms="${RBRV_CONJURE_PLATFORMS// /,}"
   132â†’
   133â†’  buc_log_args 'Extract git state for substitutions'
   134â†’  local -r z_stitch_git_commit_file="${ZRBF_STITCH_PREFIX}git_commit.txt"
   135â†’  local -r z_stitch_git_branch_file="${ZRBF_STITCH_PREFIX}git_branch.txt"
   136â†’  local -r z_stitch_git_repo_file="${ZRBF_STITCH_PREFIX}git_repo.txt"
   137â†’
   138â†’  jq -r '.commit' "${ZRBF_GIT_INFO_FILE}" > "${z_stitch_git_commit_file}" \
   139â†’    || buc_die "Failed to extract git commit from info file"
   140â†’  jq -r '.branch' "${ZRBF_GIT_INFO_FILE}" > "${z_stitch_git_branch_file}" \
   141â†’    || buc_die "Failed to extract git branch from info file"
   142â†’  jq -r '.repo'   "${ZRBF_GIT_INFO_FILE}" > "${z_stitch_git_repo_file}" \
   143â†’    || buc_die "Failed to extract git repo from info file"
   144â†’
   145â†’  local -r z_git_commit=$(<"${z_stitch_git_commit_file}")
   146â†’  local -r z_git_branch=$(<"${z_stitch_git_branch_file}")
   147â†’  local -r z_git_repo=$(<"${z_stitch_git_repo_file}")
   148â†’
   149â†’  test -n "${z_git_commit}" || buc_die "Git commit is empty"
   150â†’  test -n "${z_git_branch}" || buc_die "Git branch is empty"
   151â†’  test -n "${z_git_repo}"   || buc_die "Git repo is empty"
   152â†’
   153â†’  # Step definitions: script|builder|entrypoint|id
   154â†’  # Entrypoint 'bash' uses args ["-lc", script], 'sh' uses ["-c", script]
   155â†’  # Note: Step 05 (buildx-create) was merged into step 06 because Cloud Build
   156â†’  # steps run in isolated containers - builder state doesn't persist across steps
   157â†’  #
   158â†’  # OCI Layout Bridge pattern (steps 06-08):
   159â†’  # - Step 06: buildx exports to /workspace/oci-layout (no auth needed)
   160â†’  # - Step 07: crane pushes from oci-layout to GAR (with metadata auth)
   161â†’  # - Step 08: Syft analyzes from oci-layout (faster, more accurate)
   162â†’  # - Step 10: Assembles metadata JSON from .image_uri
   163â†’  # - Step 09: Builds and pushes metadata container (depends on step 10)
   164â†’  # Delimiter is | because image refs contain colons (sha256 digests)
   165â†’  # Note: builder images pinned via RBRR_GCB_*_IMAGE_REF variables
   166â†’  local z_step_defs=(
   167â†’    "rbgjb01-derive-tag-base.sh|${RBRR_GCB_GCLOUD_IMAGE_REF}|bash|derive-tag-base"
   168â†’    "rbgjb02-get-docker-token.sh|${RBRR_GCB_GCLOUD_IMAGE_REF}|bash|get-docker-token"
   169â†’    "rbgjb03-docker-login-gar.sh|${RBRR_GCB_DOCKER_IMAGE_REF}|bash|docker-login-gar"
   170â†’    "rbgjb04-qemu-binfmt.sh|${RBRR_GCB_DOCKER_IMAGE_REF}|bash|qemu-binfmt"
   171â†’    "rbgjb06-build-and-export.sh|${RBRR_GCB_DOCKER_IMAGE_REF}|bash|build-and-export"
   172â†’    "rbgjb07-push-with-crane.sh|${RBRR_GCB_ALPINE_IMAGE_REF}|sh|push-with-crane"
   173â†’    "rbgjb08-sbom-and-summary.sh|${RBRR_GCB_DOCKER_IMAGE_REF}|bash|sbom-and-summary"
   174â†’    "rbgjb10-assemble-metadata.sh|${RBRR_GCB_ALPINE_IMAGE_REF}|sh|assemble-metadata"
   175â†’    "rbgjb09-build-and-push-metadata.sh|${RBRR_GCB_DOCKER_IMAGE_REF}|bash|build-and-push-metadata"
   176â†’  )
   177â†’
   178â†’  local z_def=""
   179â†’  local z_script=""
   180â†’  local z_builder=""
   181â†’  local z_entrypoint=""
   182â†’  local z_id=""
   183â†’  local z_script_path=""
   184â†’  local z_body=""
   185â†’  local z_arg_flag=""
   186â†’  local z_body_file=""
   187â†’  local z_escaped_file=""
   188â†’  local z_steps_file=""
   189â†’  local z_accumulator_file="${ZRBF_STITCH_PREFIX}steps.json"
   190â†’
   191â†’  buc_log_args "Initializing empty steps array"
   192â†’  echo "[]" > "${z_accumulator_file}" || buc_die "Failed to initialize steps JSON"
   193â†’
   194â†’  for z_def in "${z_step_defs[@]}"; do
   195â†’    IFS='|' read -r z_script z_builder z_entrypoint z_id <<< "${z_def}"
   196â†’    z_script_path="${ZRBF_RBGJB_STEPS_DIR}/${z_script}"
   197â†’    z_body_file="${ZRBF_STITCH_PREFIX}${z_id}_body.txt"
   198â†’    z_escaped_file="${ZRBF_STITCH_PREFIX}${z_id}_escaped.txt"
   199â†’    z_steps_file="${ZRBF_STITCH_PREFIX}${z_id}_steps.json"
   200â†’
   201â†’    test -f "${z_script_path}" || buc_die "Step script not found: ${z_script_path}"
   202â†’
   203â†’    buc_log_args "Reading script body for ${z_id} (skip shebang, comments pass through)"
   204â†’    tail -n +2 "${z_script_path}" > "${z_body_file}" || buc_die "Failed to read step script: ${z_script_path}"
   205â†’    z_body=$(<"${z_body_file}")
   206â†’    test -n "${z_body}" || buc_die "Empty script body: ${z_script_path}"
   207â†’
   208â†’    buc_log_args "Baking pinned image refs into script text (GCB containers lack RBRR vars)"
   209â†’    z_body="${z_body//\$\{RBRR_GCB_SYFT_IMAGE_REF\}/${RBRR_GCB_SYFT_IMAGE_REF}}"
   210â†’    z_body="${z_body//\$\{RBRR_GCB_BINFMT_IMAGE_REF\}/${RBRR_GCB_BINFMT_IMAGE_REF}}"
   211â†’
   212â†’    buc_log_args "Escaping dollars for Cloud Build, preserving RBGY substitutions"
   213â†’    printf '%s' "${z_body}" | sed 's/\$/\$\$/g; s/\$\${_RBGY_/${_RBGY_/g' \
   214â†’      > "${z_escaped_file}" || buc_die "Failed to escape script body for ${z_id}"
   215â†’
   216â†’    case "${z_entrypoint}" in
   217â†’      bash) z_entrypoint="/bin/bash"; z_arg_flag="-lc" ;;
   218â†’      sh)   z_entrypoint="/bin/sh";   z_arg_flag="-c" ;;
   219â†’      *)    buc_die "Unknown entrypoint: ${z_entrypoint}" ;;
   220â†’    esac
   221â†’
   222â†’    buc_log_args "Appending step ${z_id} to JSON array"
   223â†’    jq \
   224â†’      --arg name "${z_builder}" \
   225â†’      --arg id "${z_id}" \
   226â†’      --arg ep "${z_entrypoint}" \
   227â†’      --arg flag "${z_arg_flag}" \
   228â†’      --rawfile script "${z_escaped_file}" \
   229â†’      '. + [{name: $name, id: $id, entrypoint: $ep, args: [$flag, $script]}]' \
   230â†’      "${z_accumulator_file}" > "${z_steps_file}" \
   231â†’      || buc_die "Failed to append step ${z_id} to JSON"

   236â†’  # Compose complete trigger-compatible Build resource

   245â†’    --arg zjq_dockerfile     "${z_dockerfile_name}" \
   246â†’    --arg zjq_moniker        "${z_sigil}" \

   252â†’    --arg zjq_git_branch     "${z_git_branch}" \
   253â†’    --arg zjq_git_repo       "${z_git_repo}" \
   254â†’    --arg zjq_gar_host_suffix  "${RBGC_GAR_HOST_SUFFIX}" \
   255â†’    --arg zjq_ark_suffix_image "${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_IMAGE}" \
   256â†’    --arg zjq_ark_suffix_about "${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_ABOUT}" \
   257â†’    --arg zjq_crane_tar_gz     "${RBRR_CRANE_TAR_GZ}" \
   258â†’    --arg zjq_rubric_repo      "__INSCRIBE_RUBRIC_REPO__" \
   259â†’    --arg zjq_rubric_commit    "__INSCRIBE_RUBRIC_COMMIT__" \
   260â†’    --arg zjq_inscribe_ts      "i${BURD_NOW_STAMP:0:8}_${BURD_NOW_STAMP:9:6}" \
   261â†’    --arg zjq_mtype  "${RBRR_GCB_MACHINE_TYPE}" \
   262â†’    --arg zjq_pool   "${RBRR_GCB_WORKER_POOL:-}" \
   263â†’    --arg zjq_timeout "${RBRR_GCB_TIMEOUT}" \
   264â†’    '{
   265â†’      steps: $zjq_steps[0],
   266â†’      substitutions: {
   267â†’        _RBGY_DOCKERFILE:          $zjq_dockerfile,
   268â†’        _RBGY_MONIKER:             $zjq_moniker,
   269â†’        _RBGY_PLATFORMS:           $zjq_platforms,
   270â†’        _RBGY_GAR_LOCATION:        $zjq_gar_location,
   271â†’        _RBGY_GAR_PROJECT:         $zjq_gar_project,
   272â†’        _RBGY_GAR_REPOSITORY:      $zjq_gar_repository,
   273â†’        _RBGY_GIT_COMMIT:          $zjq_git_commit,
   274â†’        _RBGY_GIT_BRANCH:          $zjq_git_branch,
   275â†’        _RBGY_GIT_REPO:            $zjq_git_repo,
   276â†’        _RBGY_GAR_HOST_SUFFIX:     $zjq_gar_host_suffix,
   277â†’        _RBGY_ARK_SUFFIX_IMAGE:    $zjq_ark_suffix_image,
   278â†’        _RBGY_ARK_SUFFIX_ABOUT:    $zjq_ark_suffix_about,
   279â†’        _RBGY_CRANE_TAR_GZ:        $zjq_crane_tar_gz,
   280â†’        _RBGY_RUBRIC_REPO:         $zjq_rubric_repo,
   281â†’        _RBGY_RUBRIC_COMMIT:       $zjq_rubric_commit,
   282â†’        _RBGY_INSCRIBE_TIMESTAMP:  $zjq_inscribe_ts
   283â†’      },
   284â†’      options: (
   285â†’          if $zjq_pool != "" then
   286â†’            { logging: "CLOUD_LOGGING_ONLY", pool: { name: $zjq_pool } }
   287â†’          else

   289â†’          end
